title: Ancient Style Golden Glance Portrait AI
sourceTitle: Ancient Style Golden Glance Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: 9:16 high-precision ancient-style xianxia refined portrait featuring adult East Asian woman, 25, refined pale face, phoenix eyes, cool quiet gaze. Subject: adult East Asian woman, 25, refined pale face, phoenix eyes, cool quiet gaze performs running lightly through palace corridor, back to camera, turning head toward lens, sleeves and shawl flying, with elegant back-facing movement, graceful head turn, flowing sleeves, shawl, hair, and ornate Tang-inspired styling. Scene: warm palace lantern corridor with columns, railings, golden bokeh creates a softly blurred palace-depth background with ancient columns, railings, warm lanterns, golden bokeh, and dreamy xianxia atmosphere. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 portrait: the subject moves from right to left with back and side-back orientation, turns toward the lens, one arm naturally extending and the other guiding sash or robe, while fabric and hair create flowing motion. Signature Elements: adult East Asian woman, 25, refined pale face, phoenix eyes, cool quiet gaze, running lightly through palace corridor, back to camera, turning head toward lens, sleeves and shawl flying, warm palace lantern corridor with columns, railings, golden bokeh, ivory-red-gold Tang-style costume, golden hair ornament, palace lantern corridor, flowing sleeves and shawl, warm bokeh, and refined xianxia poster mood. Style: High-end ancient costume refined portrait, Tang-fantasy xianxia aesthetics, ornate romantic drama lead styling, glossy yet natural retouching, dreamlike Eastern fantasy character poster finish. Color Palette: Ivory white, pearl white, warm gold, restrained red embroidery accents, soft lantern amber, black hair, and translucent gauze layers. Lighting: Warm golden soft light, palace-lantern accent glow, clear hair rim light, luminous face light, and bright transparent dreamlike atmosphere. Camera: Vertical cinematic portrait camera with elegant motion capture, shallow background blur, readable face, fabric motion, and natural arm coordination. Materials: Layered silk, chiffon, embroidered gauze, gold-thread floral patterns, cloud and vine motifs, pearl tassels, gold hair crown, jeweled accessories, and translucent flowing shawl. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
